items.note: Egg-based.

items.note: The GF crust sold on its own.

items.ja: 米粉パン「白山もちパン」6枚
items.note: Egg/dairy content unconfirmed — ask.
Egg/dairy content unconfirmed — ask.

Made from stone-milled Ishikawa Koshihikari rice flour (no wheat) with whipped egg white, milk and a little salt. Contains egg + dairy, so not vegan. The kitchen also makes wheat-flour pancakes — a celiac should confirm there is no shared-utensil/griddle cross-contamination.

items.ja: 能登大納言あずきの米粉パンケーキ
items.romaji: Noto Dainagon azuki no kome-ko pankeeki
items.note: Rice-flour pancake with red-bean cream and matcha ice cream (dairy). Rice-flour base is wheat-free but shares a kitchen with wheat pancakes — confirm no cross-contamination.

items.ja: 加賀野菜 五郎島金時の米粉モンブランパンケーキ
items.romaji: Kaga-yasai Gorojima-kintoki no kome-ko monburan pankeeki
items.en: Gorojima sweet-potato Mont Blanc rice-flour pancake
items.note: Rice-flour pancake with sweet-potato Mont Blanc cream and vanilla ice cream (dairy). Wheat-free base but shared kitchen with wheat flour — confirm no cross-contamination.

items.en: Anmitsu (agar jelly, red-bean paste, dumplings, fruit)
items.note: Everything here is homemade — agar jelly (kanten), red-bean paste (anko), shiratama rice dumplings and Tamba azuki are all naturally wheat-free. Confirm no wheat-based garnish. For vegan, order it without cream/ice cream (base anmitsu with kuromitsu syrup is plant-based).
Same wheat-free anmitsu base plus dairy cream/ice cream. GF if no wheat added; not vegan (dairy) — ask for plain anmitsu to make it vegan.
Homemade Tamba red-bean soup with shiratama rice dumplings — naturally wheat-free & plant-based. Confirm no wheat additions; order without ice cream for vegan.
Kudzu-starch (kuzu) noodles served with kuromitsu black-sugar syrup — naturally wheat-free and plant-based. Confirm it is 100% kudzu starch (not a wheat-starch blend).

items.en: Bracken-starch mochi with kinako & black-sugar syrup
items.note: Bracken-starch (warabi) jelly dusted with roasted-soybean kinako and kuromitsu syrup — naturally wheat-free & vegan. Confirm authentic bracken starch with no wheat-starch blend.
Red-bean soup with shiratama rice dumplings — naturally wheat-free & plant-based. Confirm no wheat additions.

items.ja: 白玉クリームあんみつ
items.en: Anmitsu with rice dumplings and cream
items.note: Agar jelly, red-bean paste and shiratama rice dumplings are wheat-free; contains dairy cream. Ask to omit cream for vegan; confirm no wheat garnish.
Rice mochi dusted with kinako (roasted soybean flour) and sugar — naturally wheat-free & vegan. Confirm no wheat.
Grilled rice mochi wrapped in nori seaweed and normally brushed with soy sauce (contains wheat). Ask them to use tamari or serve with salt only, and to hold any bonito for vegan.

items.en: Shaved ice with black-sugar syrup & soybean flour
items.note: Shaved ice with kuromitsu black-sugar syrup and kinako — naturally wheat-free & plant-based. Confirm the syrup/toppings contain no wheat.

items.en: Somen noodles with plum (hot or cold)
items.note: Somen are wheat noodles — not gluten-free.
Made from the shop's own concentrated soy milk (2–3x the beans) plus granulated sugar — dairy-free and plant-based. Ask for a cup (カップ) rather than a wheat cone. Seasonal, roughly April–October.

items.ja: とうふアイスクリーム
items.note: House silk tofu blended into a light gelato-style ice cream — dairy-free. Sold year-round. Ask for a cup, not a wheat cone; confirm base has no wheat.
Plain handmade tofu — soybeans, water, nigari only. Naturally gluten-free and vegan.
Deep-fried tofu (no batter), plant-based. Confirm the frying oil is not shared with any wheat-battered items.

items.en: Noto Dainagon red-bean soup with grill-your-own mochi
items.note: Noto Dainagon red-bean soup; you grill the rice mochi yourself at the table. Naturally wheat-free & plant-based — confirm no wheat additions.

items.en: White-sesame sweet soup with mochi & chestnut
items.note: White-sesame sweet soup with rice mochi and chestnut — naturally wheat-free & plant-based. Confirm no wheat additions.

Rakugan (the shop's specialty) are pressed sweets made from rice flour and refined wasanbon sugar — naturally wheat-free and vegan; matcha is gluten-free. Confirm the specific rakugan is the rice-flour type, not a wheat-flour variety.

items.en: Shaved ice with red bean & rice dumplings
items.note: Shaved ice made with high-grade sugar, topped with red-bean paste and shiratama rice dumplings — naturally wheat-free & plant-based. Confirm syrups/toppings have no wheat.
Bracken-starch (warabi) mochi with kurogane black-sugar syrup and black-soybean kinako — naturally wheat-free & vegan. Confirm authentic bracken starch with no wheat-starch blend.

items.en: Three-colour roasted soybeans with Noto salt
items.note: Roasted white, green and black soybeans with Noto Peninsula salt — naturally gluten-free & vegan.

items.ja: 無農薬の国造柚子ソーダ
items.en: Organic yuzu soda (served with amanatto & yokan)
items.note: Fresh yuzu soda served with candied beans (amanatto) and yokan, both of which are wheat-free & vegan. Optional bean-honey syrup. Confirm the accompaniments carry no wheat.

items.en: Assorted amanatto & yokan plate with ice cream
items.note: Amanatto (candied beans) and yokan (red-bean & agar jelly) are naturally wheat-free & vegan; the accompanying ice cream is dairy — ask to omit it for vegan.
Beans slowly candied in carefully selected sugar, with no bleach, colouring or preservatives and no wheat — naturally gluten-free & vegan. The shop's specialty.
Red-bean paste set with agar (kanten) and sugar — naturally wheat-free & vegan.
Jelly confections — wheat-free, but confirm they are set with agar (not animal gelatin) if vegan is required.

items.en: Seed Lunch (4 veg sides, salad, brown rice, soup)
items.note: Pesticide-free brown rice (GF) with organic salad, soup and four rotating vegetable sides. Sides sometimes include fish (e.g. tuna) and soy-sauce/miso seasoning (wheat) — ask which sides are plant-based and wheat-free, and request veg seasoned with salt rather than soy sauce. Brown rice and salad are safe.

Made with rice-flour noodles (米粉, wheat-free base) and vegetables, with organic salad. Confirm the stir-fry sauce is soy-sauce-free or tamari and has no oyster sauce; ask to hold fish sauce/egg for vegan.

items.ja: 季節野菜のグリーンカレー
items.note: Thai-style coconut green curry with vegetables over rice — no wheat flour roux (unlike Japanese curry). Confirm the curry paste is wheat-free and ask to omit fish sauce/shrimp paste for vegan.

items.ja: ヴィーガンアイスクリーム
items.en: Vegan ice cream (chocolate / black-bean sesame / apple-banana)
items.note: Made without dairy, egg or white sugar — plant-based. Confirm no wheat/cookie inclusions in the flavour chosen.

items.ja: バナナとラズベリーのマフィン
items.note: Vegan, but made with wheat flour — not gluten-free.

kz_kanazawa_nanahoshi_curry.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Only the set price is cross-verified; a-la-carte curry prices conflicted between sources and were omitted.

items.ja: 金澤ななほしカレーセット
items.en: Nanahoshi Curry Set (choose 2 curries + 2 toppings; includes nut-milk soup, dessert, pickles)
items.note: Spice-curry style; base curries include chicken, bean (豆), and seasonal A. Rice is GF but confirm the curry has NO wheat-flour roux and NO soy sauce (小麦粉ルウ・醤油不使用か確認). For vegan, choose the bean curry and confirm the included soup/dessert/pickles are plant-based — nut-milk soup may be OK but dessert likely not.

items.ja: ビーフ / 季節のカレーB へ変更
items.en: Upgrade set curry choice to beef or seasonal curry B
items.note: Upgrade option on the set. Same GF caveat: confirm no wheat roux or soy sauce.
Composition not published; confirm no wheat (sponge/wafer/dorayaki skin) before ordering.

items.ja: 自分で点てるお抹茶セット（上生菓子付き）
items.romaji: Jibun de Tateru Omatcha Set (jō-namagashi tsuki)
items.en: Whisk-your-own matcha set with jō-namagashi wagashi
items.note: Matcha (powdered green tea + water) is GF and vegan. Jō-namagashi are usually nerikiri (white-bean paste + rice) and GF/vegan, but some contain wheat — confirm the specific sweet.
Anmitsu components — kanten (agar/seaweed), anko (azuki), shiratama (rice flour), kuromitsu (brown-sugar syrup), fruit — are typically GF and vegan; confirm no gyuhi/ice cream or wheat add-ins.
Matcha assortment may include wheat items (cake/roll) alongside GF ones (matcha warabi mochi is GF, from bracken/potato starch). Confirm each component.

items.ja: 金沢あんこ専門店のぜんざい
items.en: Zenzai (sweet azuki soup) from a Kanazawa anko specialist
items.note: Zenzai is azuki bean + sugar soup with mochi (rice) — traditionally GF and vegan; confirm no wheat and no grilled-mochi coating with additives.

items.ja: 金澤氷室かき氷　抹茶（金澤棒茶付き）
items.romaji: Kanazawa Himuro Kakigōri Matcha (Kanazawa Bōcha tsuki)
items.en: Himuro shaved ice, matcha (with Kanazawa roasted-stem tea)
items.note: Shaved ice + matcha syrup is GF; often topped with anko (GF) and/or condensed milk (not vegan). Accompanying bōcha (roasted stem tea) is GF and vegan. Confirm toppings.

items.ja: 金澤氷室かき氷　苺（金澤棒茶付き）
items.romaji: Kanazawa Himuro Kakigōri Ichigo (Kanazawa Bōcha tsuki)
items.en: Himuro shaved ice, strawberry (with Kanazawa roasted-stem tea)
items.note: Ice + strawberry syrup is typically GF and vegan; confirm no condensed milk / wheat-containing toppings. Accompanying bōcha is GF/vegan.
Add-on drink with sweets. Plain tea/coffee (black) is GF and vegan; specify no milk for vegan and confirm no wheat additives.

kz_jardin_paul_bocuse.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Prices include 10% tax and 10% service charge.

items.note: French haute cuisine — courses normally contain wheat (bread, flour-thickened sauces). Notify the kitchen of celiac/vegan needs at reservation; upscale French kitchens can often adapt with notice.
See allergy note — arrange gluten-free/vegan accommodation in advance.

kz_kusuriya_cafe.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Congee is ¥600 dine-in / ¥650 take-out; reservation recommended for congee.

items.ja: 季節の薬膳スープランチ（月替り）
items.en: Seasonal medicinal (yakuzen) soup lunch (monthly-changing; served with herbal tea)
items.note: Monthly-changing vegetable soup (e.g. minestrone, pumpkin soymilk potage) with 薬膳茶. Confirm broth has no wheat/soy-sauce seasoning and no chicken/meat stock for that month's soup.

items.ja: 薬膳カレー トマトとお豆のジンジャーキーマカレー
items.romaji: Yakuzen karē tomato to omame no jinjā kīma karē
items.note: Keema = ground meat, so not vegan. Spice-based curries can be flour-free but confirm no wheat-flour roux and no soy-sauce/wheat seasoning.

items.ja: 薬膳粥・ネギと生姜の鶏粥
items.romaji: Yakuzen gayu · negi to shōga no torigayu
items.en: Medicinal chicken congee with scallion and ginger
items.note: Rice congee is naturally GF, but contains chicken (not vegan). Confirm seasoned with salt 塩 not soy sauce 醤油.

items.ja: 薬膳粥・たっぷりキャベツとトマトの鶏粥
items.romaji: Yakuzen gayu · tappuri kyabetsu to tomato no torigayu
items.en: Medicinal chicken congee with cabbage and tomato
items.note: Rice congee base is naturally GF, but contains chicken. Confirm salt-seasoned, no soy sauce/wheat.

items.ja: 薬膳粥・ひき肉ときのこの酸辣湯ふう粥
items.romaji: Yakuzen gayu · hikiniku to kinoko no sanratan-fū gayu
items.en: Hot-and-sour style congee with ground meat and mushroom
items.note: 酸辣湯 (hot-and-sour) style typically uses soy sauce/vinegar and sometimes wheat starch, and contains ground meat. Avoid.
Egg-custard pudding is usually flour-free but not vegan (egg/milk). Confirm no wheat.

items.ja: 黒糖ブラウニー（シナモンナッツ／白ゴマきなこ）
items.note: Brownie contains wheat flour.
Cake contains wheat flour.

items.ja: ローズレーズンティー
items.note: Herbal tea, gluten-free and vegan as served. Original-blend medicinal teas 薬膳茶 also available.

kz_shijimaya_honpo_honten_k.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Fermentation-cafe (発酵カフェ) drink/gelato menu; amazake is non-alcoholic rice-koji based.

items.note: Made from rice koji 米糀 only (no barley, no dairy, no alcohol) — gluten-free and vegan as served.

items.ja: 甘酒ソーダ（ストレート／しそ／ゆず／しょうが）
items.note: Rice-koji amazake with soda; gluten-free and vegan as served.
Amazake base is GF, but gelato commonly contains dairy — confirm milk-free for vegan and no wheat/cookie additions.

items.ja: 甘酒ゆずバジルジェラート
items.note: Amazake base is GF, but gelato commonly contains dairy — confirm milk-free and no wheat additions.

kz_cafe_kan_honten.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Drink prices are not published on the official site.

items.ja: 抹茶生どら焼きプレート
items.note: Dorayaki is a wheat-flour pancake with egg; not celiac-safe and not vegan.

items.ja: 2種のいちじく食べ比べどら焼きプレート
items.note: Wheat-flour dorayaki with egg; seasonal.
Wheat-flour dorayaki with egg and cream; price not listed.
Parfaits contain dairy cream/ice cream and usually a wheat crumble or cookie; conservatively unsafe.

items.ja: 黒いちじく白秋パフェ
items.note: Dairy plus likely wheat elements; seasonal.

items.ja: 加賀棒茶ときなこのパフェ
items.note: Dairy and likely wheat components; price not listed.
Composition varies; assume dairy + wheat unless kitchen confirms.

items.ja: 珠手箱（かしわくんの和菓子箱）／金沢珠手箱
items.note: Assortment of wagashi. Many components (mochi, anko, kanten) are GF/vegan but the box may include wheat-based or egg/dairy pieces; ask which pieces are safe.
Base of kanten jelly, azuki, mochi, fruit and kuromitsu is usually GF; confirm no wheat monaka/wafer and no wheat in the syrup. Contains dairy ice cream — ask to omit the ice cream for vegan.
Azuki/kanten base typically GF; contains dairy ice cream — ask to omit for vegan.
Shaved ice with syrup is usually GF/vegan; confirm syrup and any topping (some use condensed milk or wheat-based crumble).
Black coffee is GF and vegan.
Made with dairy milk; ask if plant milk is available.
Matcha is GF; made with dairy milk — ask for plant milk.
Roasted tea is GF; dairy milk — ask for plant milk.
Kinako is roasted soybean flour (GF); dairy milk — ask for plant milk.
Sesame is GF; dairy milk — ask for plant milk.

items.ja: 加賀棒茶と玄米のお茶
items.note: Roasted tea with brown rice; GF and vegan.
Plain black tea; GF and vegan.
Roasted black soybean tea; GF and vegan.
Plain green tea; GF and vegan.
Whisked matcha; GF and vegan.

items.ja: トロピカルフルーツアイスティー
items.note: Tea-based; confirm no dairy/honey in the fruit blend.

items.en: Hojicha, choice of 3 (Kensho Kaga-bocha / Kaga Hojicha / Seasonal Hojicha)
items.note: Roasted green tea only — naturally GF and vegan. You smell each leaf before choosing. A cold-brew Kensho Kaga-bocha welcome tea is served free on arrival.

items.ja: ほうじ茶 + 季節の菓子セット
items.note: Tea is GF/vegan; the paired seasonal sweet varies (from fresh wagashi to Western tarts/bites). Wagashi like mochi/anko are usually safe, but Western tarts contain wheat/dairy/egg. Ask what today's sweet is (roughly +¥400 over tea alone).

kz_kura.price_note: Prices approximate — may change. Prices differ slightly between sources (e.g. soba-gozen listed as ¥1,000–1,080).

items.note: House soba is a buckwheat-wheat blend (not juwari/十割), so noodles contain wheat — not celiac-safe. Dipping tsuyu also contains wheat soy sauce and bonito dashi (not vegan).
Coarser-ground soba but still a buckwheat-wheat blend; noodles contain wheat. Tsuyu has wheat soy sauce and dashi.
Tempura uses wheat batter and the noodles contain wheat — not safe. Not vegan.
Wheat tempura batter plus wheat-blend noodles; hot broth has wheat soy sauce and dashi.
Wheat-blend noodles, duck meat, and a soy/dashi broth — not celiac-safe and not vegan.

items.en: Soba set (small seiro, soba tofu, soba-tororo rice, small sides, pickles)
items.note: Soba noodles contain wheat. The soba tofu and plain rice may be safe individually, but the set includes tsuyu (wheat soy sauce) and sides of unknown seasoning; not reliably GF/vegan.
Udon is wheat noodles and the curry roux is wheat-thickened — not celiac-safe. Broth typically has dashi/meat, not vegan.
Plant-based patty, but default bun is wheat. Gluten-free bun is a paid substitution (+¥330). Only GF with the GF bun swap.

items.ja: グルテンフリーバンズ（変更）
items.note: Paid swap to make the burger gluten-free; default bun contains wheat. Shared kitchen — confirm handling.

items.ja: ヴィーガンチーズ（追加）
items.note: Confirm gluten status of the cheese with staff.

items.ja: 蟹たっぷりハントンライス
items.note: Hanton rice is traditionally battered/fried — assume wheat unless confirmed.

items.ja: LfAオリジナル中トロ刺身
items.note: Confirm whether served with wheat-based soy sauce.
Pizza base contains wheat — not gluten-free.

items.ja: カリフォルニア・アボカドボード
items.note: Confirm accompaniments (bread/crackers) for gluten.
Naturally gluten-free; confirm seasoning contains no wheat-based soy sauce.

items.ja: クラフトビール（加賀棒茶スタウト／UNITE IPA／きまエール）
items.en: Craft beers (Kaga-boucha stout / UNITE IPA / Kima ale)
items.note: Barley/wheat craft beer — contains gluten. Poured on premises.

items.ja: ファラフェルサンド（ドリンク付き）
items.note: Served in wheat pita by default. Pita CAN be swapped to rice-flour (米粉) on request — ask for the rice-flour version to make it gluten-free.

items.ja: ファラフェルサンド（ハーフ）＋米粉ケーキ セット（ドリンク付き）
items.en: Half falafel sandwich + rice-flour cake set (with drink)
items.note: Half sandwich in wheat pita (rice-flour swap available). The rice-flour cake portion is gluten-free.

items.ja: 米粉ケーキ（ガトーココア／ガトー抹茶）
items.note: Made with rice flour (not wheat) by vegan maker atelier 絲 (Ito) in Kahoku. Naturally gluten-free.
Chickpea-based, naturally gluten-free — but order without pita, or with rice-flour bread.
Naturally gluten-free.
Oat-based — oats carry gluten cross-contamination risk; not recommended for strict celiacs.

items.ja: オーツミルクブリュー
items.note: Oat milk — gluten cross-contamination risk. Ask for a non-oat milk if strict.

items.ja: コイルおかもちセット
items.en: Coil Okamochi set — matcha + 5 toppings + hosomaki + gunkan + tendon
items.note: Shared sushi/tempura kitchen. Tendon is deep-fried in wheat batter; standard soy sauce contains wheat. NOT gluten-free by default — a separate GF course must be booked via TableCheck.

items.ja: グルテンフリーコース（要予約 TableCheck）
items.note: A dedicated GF course is advertised but the venue is a shared sushi/tempura kitchen with no documented dedicated fryer/prep area or confirmed wheat-free soy sauce. Celiacs should confirm protocol directly before relying on it.

items.ja: ヴィーガンコース（要予約 TableCheck）
items.note: Plant-based course available on reservation.
Plain matcha is naturally gluten-free.

items.ja: 細巻きの追加海苔シート
items.note: Nori/rice base, but shared prep and wheat soy sauce nearby — confirm for celiac.
Deep-fried tempura in wheat batter — contains gluten.

items.ja: 米粉マフィン（ヴィーガン）
items.note: Made with rice flour and described as gluten-free & vegan. Vegan cafe, not a dedicated GF kitchen — confirm no shared wheat handling. Mondays ¥200 takeout.

items.ja: ベジコンビネーションランチ（スープ・コーヒー付き）
items.note: Vegan plate using seasonal Kaga vegetables. May include soy-based meat substitutes / wheat seasonings — ask which components are gluten-free.
Confirm the specific dessert; rice-flour options may be gluten-free but varies daily.

items.ja: ベジコンビネーションランチ
items.en: Veg Combination Lunch (large seasonal Kaga-vegetable salad + choice of ginger 'steak' bowl or soy burger, with soup & coffee)
items.note: Ginger/teriyaki and burger components likely use wheat-containing seasonings; not a dedicated GF kitchen.

items.ja: プレミアムサラダランチ
items.en: Premium Salad Lunch (large organic Kaga-vegetable salad)
items.note: Salad base is raw vegetables but dressings/seasonings not confirmed GF.

items.ja: グルテンフリー米粉マフィン
items.en: Gluten-free rice-flour vegan muffin (baked daily, takeout)
items.note: Made with rice flour and marketed gluten-free; baked in a shared (non-dedicated) kitchen, so residual cross-contact risk.

items.ja: 米粉のマフィン（無農薬レモン＆ヴィーガンカスタード）
items.romaji: komeko no mafin (muno'yaku remon & viigan kasutaado)
